subject: Anthropic — quick chat about Product Manager, Claude Code
body:
Hi Jane,

I'm a recruiter at Anthropic — really enjoyed your OpenLedger project, and your developer-experience work at Stripe lines up well with the PM, Claude Code role we're hiring for.

Would love to set up a 30-minute chat to walk you through the role and the team. I have the following slots open this week — all times Pacific:

- Wed Jun 3, 10:00–10:30 AM PT
- Thu Jun 4, 2:00–2:30 PM PT
- Fri Jun 5, 11:00–11:30 AM PT

Let me know what works, or feel free to suggest other times.

Best,
Priya
